$comment: Layer C for TARIFF vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS O2x). Input position 0 is the weight (PIC 9(5)V99). The X(3) zone-code cells are text values layer C carries but never solves over (exactly the X-scalar treatment); the numeric rate cells are constants, so each per-zone ROUNDED charge is an affine half-cent obligation over the weight, and the BULK tier splits on a sum of three rounded values - a single-variable monotone staircase (solveMixedRounding), with the BULK-path obligations seeded through the rounded gate by the through-rounding lower bound.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 TARIFF (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-tariff)
